# Communication Guide / Guide de communication

## Channels / Canaux

| Channel | Purpose | Language |
|---------|---------|----------|
| [Discord](https://discord.gg/xjF8Rtzyd4) | Support, discussion, announcements | FR / EN |
| [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Team-Arcadia/Arcadia-Spawn-Dimension/issues) | Bug reports, feature requests | FR / EN |
| [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/Team-Arcadia/Arcadia-Spawn-Dimension/discussions) | General Q&A, ideas | FR / EN |

## For Players / Pour les joueurs

- **Bug?** Use the [bug report template](https://github.com/Team-Arcadia/Arcadia-Spawn-Dimension/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- **Feature idea?** Use the [feature request template](https://github.com/Team-Arcadia/Arcadia-Spawn-Dimension/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
- **Quick question?** Ask on [Discord](https://discord.gg/xjF8Rtzyd4)

## For Developers / Pour les developpeurs

- Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) before submitting code
- Use [Pull Request template](PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md) for all PRs
- Join `#dev` channel on Discord for technical discussion

## For Server Owners / Pour les proprietaires de serveur

- Configuration help: Discord `#support`
- Spawn dimension setup: See [README.md](../README.md)
- Performance concerns: Open an issue with `performance` label

## Response Times / Delais de reponse

| Type | Expected Response |
|------|------------------|
| Security vulnerability | < 48 hours |
| Bug report (critical) | < 72 hours |
| Bug report (minor) | < 1 week |
| Feature request | < 2 weeks |
| Pull request review | < 1 week |

## Language Policy / Politique linguistique

- Issues and PRs can be written in **English or French**
- Code and comments must be in **English**
- UI text must support **both EN and FR** via `LocalizationManager`

---

# Guide de communication (Francais)

## Pour les joueurs
- **Un bug ?** Utilisez le [template de rapport de bug](https://github.com/Team-Arcadia/Arcadia-Spawn-Dimension/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- **Une idee ?** Utilisez le [template de demande](https://github.com/Team-Arcadia/Arcadia-Spawn-Dimension/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
- **Question rapide ?** Demandez sur [Discord](https://discord.gg/xjF8Rtzyd4)

## Pour les developpeurs
- Lisez [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) avant de soumettre du code
- Rejoignez le canal `#dev` sur Discord pour les discussions techniques
